'''Tike Flume''' was the older brother of [[Trever Flume]]. He participated in the resistance movement against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]] with his [[Trever Flume's father|father]]. In an attempt to prevent the seizure of a defense plant on their homeworld, Tike went off to protest inside the plant. When his father arrived to bring his son home, the facility exploded, resulting in both their [[Death/Legends|deaths]]. Tike taught Trever in the art of explosives.
